engineIntelligence.h2: Fiat Mobi Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Fiat Mobi in the UK via import, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data for Brazilian-spec units.

cards.altText: Fiat Mobi 312B2000 engine - petrol 1.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Head gasket failure - common on high-mileage units over 80k miles, causes coolant loss.
Timing belt wear - replacement required every 60k miles to avoid catastrophic failure.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,200-£2,800 (supply only) Estimated from comparable Fire Evo units - actual quotes may vary due to import logistics.

cards.altText: Fiat Mobi GSE4G10 engine - petrol 1.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain rattle - tensioner wear causes startup noise, documented from 50k miles.
Carbon buildup on intake valves - affects performance on short-journey driving.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,400-£3,200 (supply only) Estimated from comparable Firefly units - actual quotes may vary due to import logistics.

cards.altText: Fiat Mobi 312A1000 engine - petrol 1.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Cooling system leaks - radiator and hose failures common in hot climate operation.
Oil pressure sensor faults - warning light triggered by sensor rather than pump failure.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,300-£2,900 (supply only) Estimated from comparable Fire Evo units - actual quotes may vary due to import logistics.

commonProblems.h2: Fiat Mobi Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Fiat Mobi's 1.0 Fire Evo and Firefly engines are generally robust but face specific failure patterns common to Brazilian-market operation and UK import use. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost breakdowns below to decide between repair and replacement.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Rattle - Why Firefly Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Mobi Drive, Trekking facelift (2017-2024, GSE4G10 & 312A1000)
problems.rootCause: The Firefly's timing chain tensioner can wear prematurely, allowing chain slack that causes startup rattle and potential jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner and guide rails before chain damage occurs
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before chain stretch; 20-30k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides and sprockets with upgraded components
repairOptions.longevity: Restores factory timing; suitable if block/head undamaged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Firefly engine with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if chain has jumped or caused valve damage; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: On a Fiat Mobi worth £4,000-£7,000, preventative tensioner replacement at 45k miles offers excellent value. If rattle is already present, get quotes for both full timing set and rebuilt engine - the cost difference is often smaller than expected once import logistics are factored in.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt Firefly engine prices for your Fiat Mobi

problems.h4: Head Gasket Failure - Why Fire Evo Engines Overheat
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Mobi Easy, Like, Way, Trekking pre-facelift (2016-2021, 312B2000 & 312A2000)
problems.rootCause: High-mileage Fire Evo units can suffer head gasket degradation, often accelerated by cooling system neglect or hot-climate operation.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace thermostat, radiator cap, hoses and flush system
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative only; won't fix existing gasket failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace gasket, machine head surface, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged and mileage under 90k; 30-50k mile expectancy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Fire Evo engine with upgraded gasket set, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value on high-mileage units; eliminates risk of block warping or repeat failure

problems.recommendation: If your Fire Evo Mobi has exceeded 85k miles and shows coolant loss, a rebuilt engine often represents better long-term value than a head gasket repair, especially given the import logistics involved in sourcing Brazilian-spec components.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 312B2000 Fiat Mobi engine replacement

problems.h4: Cooling System Failure - Radiator and Hose Leaks
problems.affectedModels: All Fiat Mobi variants (2016-Present, all engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Plastic radiator end tanks and rubber cooling hoses degrade faster in hot Brazilian climates; UK imports may arrive with pre-weakened components.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace radiator cap, upper/lower hoses and bleed system
repairOptions.longevity: Quick fix for minor leaks; doesn't address radiator core issues

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace radiator assembly with upgraded aluminium-core unit
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if original plastic-tank radiator shows signs of age

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine (if overheating damage occurred)
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine if overheating caused head warping or gasket failure
repairOptions.longevity: Only required if cooling failure led to secondary engine damage

problems.recommendation: Proactively replace the radiator and all cooling hoses on any imported Mobi over 70k miles, regardless of visible leaks. The cost is modest compared to the risk of overheating damage requiring full engine replacement.
problems.cta: Find Fiat Mobi cooling system specialists UK

problems.h4: Oil Pressure Warning - Sensor vs Pump Failure
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Mobi all variants (2016-Present, all engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Oil pressure sending units can fail electronically, triggering warning lights without actual pump failure; genuine pump wear is rarer but serious.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace oil pressure sending unit and clear fault codes
repairOptions.longevity: First step for any oil warning; resolves 80% of cases

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Drop sump, replace oil pump and pickup strainer, refill with correct spec oil
repairOptions.longevity: Required if sensor replacement doesn't resolve warning or pressure test confirms low pressure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine if low oil pressure caused bearing wear or knock
repairOptions.longevity: Only if engine shows mechanical damage from prolonged oil starvation

problems.recommendation: Always replace the oil pressure sensor first when the warning appears. If the light persists or you hear knocking, stop driving immediately and get a compression test before deciding between pump replacement or full rebuild.
problems.cta: Compare Fiat Mobi engine repair vs replacement costs

problems.h4: Poor Acceleration - EGR and Throttle Body Issues
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Mobi all variants with electronic throttle (2018-Present, all engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Carbon buildup on throttle bodies and EGR valves restricts airflow; Brazilian-market calibration can be sensitive to UK fuel quality.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Clean or replace electronic throttle body and perform adaptation reset
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for mild power loss; may need repeating every 30k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Clean, replace or blank EGR valve and update ECU mapping
repairOptions.longevity: Improves reliability on UK fuel; blanking may affect emissions compliance

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine only if carbon buildup caused valve or piston damage
repairOptions.longevity: Rarely needed for acceleration issues alone; consider only with other major faults

problems.recommendation: Start with throttle body cleaning and an EGR service. If power loss persists after these relatively low-cost interventions, investigate fuel delivery and ignition components before considering engine replacement.
problems.cta: Get diagnostic quotes for Fiat Mobi performance issues

problems.affectedModels: Fiat Mobi Drive, Trekking facelift, 2025 models (2017-Present, GSE4G10 & 312A1000)
problems.rootCause: The Firefly's 3-cylinder design relies on balance shafts and engine mounts; wear in either amplifies inherent vibration.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace worn hydraulic or rubber engine mounts
repairOptions.longevity: First step for vibration; often resolves 70% of complaints

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Inspect and replace balance shaft bearings or chains if accessible
repairOptions.longevity: Complex job; only pursue if mounts don't resolve vibration and noise is present

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Firefly with upgraded mounts and balanced rotating assembly
repairOptions.longevity: Consider only if vibration is accompanied by knocking or oil consumption

problems.recommendation: Vibration alone on a Firefly Mobi is rarely an engine-replacement trigger. Replace mounts first, then assess. If the engine runs smoothly otherwise, the vibration may be an acceptable characteristic of the 3-cylinder design.
problems.cta: Compare Fiat Mobi Firefly engine prices with upgraded mounts

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Fiat Mobi
finalCta.paragraph: The Fiat Mobi's import status makes engine decisions uniquely challenging, but our UK network specialises in sourcing Brazilian-spec units with full warranty coverage. Whether you need a preventative timing service or a complete rebuilt engine, comparing quotes through EngineMarket ensures you get specialist pricing without the main dealer premium. Every engine supplied includes upgraded components addressing known failure points and nationwide delivery to your chosen garage.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Fiat Mobi Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Fiat Mobi and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.familiesLabel: Common Fiat Mobi Petrol Engine Families
families: 312B2000 - Fire Evo 4-cyl (Easy/Like/Way), head gasket prone at high mileage
GSE4G10 - Firefly 3-cyl (Drive/Trekking), timing chain tensioner wear common
312A2000/312A1000 - early production codes, mechanically similar to main families
foundIn: First generation (2016-2020) - Fire Evo dominant, Firefly introduced 2017
Facelift generation (2021-Present) - Firefly standard, Fire Evo phased out
knownFor: Simple, lightweight design suited to urban Brazilian conditions
Fire Evo timing belt requires 60k mile replacement to avoid failure
Firefly offers better fuel economy but rarer in UK import market
Both families share 327 platform components with Fiat Uno
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Mobi Petrol replacement engines

items.title: Fiat Mobi Flex Fuel Engines
items.description: Brazilian-market flex-fuel variants of both Fire Evo and Firefly engines, capable of running on petrol, ethanol or any mixture.

families: 312B2000FF - Fire Evo flex-fuel, Easy/Like Flex variants
GSE4G10FF - Firefly flex-fuel, Drive/Trekking Flex variants
Ethanol content sensor adjusts fuel mapping and ignition timing automatically
Hardened fuel injectors and lines resist ethanol corrosion
Power output increases 5-8% when running on pure ethanol
foundIn: Easy Flex, Like Flex, Trekking Flex, Way Flex (2016-Present)

Fuel system may require inspection for ethanol-related corrosion on import
Replacement engines must match flex or non-flex specification for ECU compatibility

engineYears.h2: Fiat Mobi Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Fiat Mobi's production history, organised so UK import owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: The Mobi launched exclusively with the 1.0 Fire Evo 4-cylinder engine across Easy, Like and Way trims.
keyChanges: Fiat Mobi introduced to Brazilian market, later imported privately to UK
Fire Evo engine code 312B2000 standard across all variants
Manual transmission only; no automatic option at launch
knownFor: Simple, proven engine design with wide parts compatibility
Head gasket failures begin appearing on high-mileage examples
Cooling system components prone to degradation in hot climates
years.cta: Get quotes for 2016-2017 Fiat Mobi replacement engines

years.description: The efficient 3-cylinder Firefly engine debuted in the new Drive variant, running alongside Fire Evo in other trims.
keyChanges: Firefly engine (GSE4G10) introduced for Mobi Drive variant
Easy On and Like On entry trims added with Fire Evo
First flex-fuel variants offered in Brazilian domestic market
knownFor: Firefly offers improved fuel economy but timing chain concerns emerge
Fire Evo remains reliable if timing belt serviced at 60k miles
Drive variant commands premium in UK import market due to Firefly demand
years.cta: Compare Firefly engine prices for your Fiat Mobi
years.ticker: Fiat Mobi Drive engine replacement • Firefly timing chain rattle • Mobi Fire Evo head gasket

years.description: Post-facelift Mobi variants standardised on the Firefly engine, with Fire Evo phased out of new production.
keyChanges: Facelift styling with updated front/rear design
Firefly engine becomes standard across Trekking and Drive
Fire Evo retained only for base Easy/Like in final production runs
GSR automated manual transmission offered on select variants
knownFor: Firefly timing chain tensioner wear now well-documented on 60k+ mile units
Facelift Trekking commands highest replacement demand in UK import market
Fire Evo parts availability remains good via Fiat Uno compatibility
years.cta: Get quotes for facelift Fiat Mobi engine replacement
years.ticker: Mobi Trekking Firefly engine • Facelift engine compatibility • Firefly rebuilt cost UK

years.description: The 2025 model year reintroduces updated Firefly engines with revised ECU calibration and emissions compliance for newer imports.
keyChanges: Updated Firefly engine with revised mapping for emissions compliance
Electronic throttle standard across all variants
Potential mild-hybrid assistance in Brazilian domestic market (not yet UK-imported)
mainEngines: GSE4G10 (2025 spec) - 1.0 petrol Firefly with updated calibration
GSE4G10FF (2025 spec) - flex-fuel variant for Brazilian market
knownFor: Very limited UK import presence to date; replacement demand emerging
Updated Firefly addresses some early tensioner concerns but remains chain-driven
Parts compatibility with pre-2025 Firefly units requires verification
years.cta: Enquire about 2025 Fiat Mobi Firefly engine availability

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Fiat Mobi was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Fiat Mobi specialists.

faq.h2: Fiat Mobi Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Can I get a Fiat Mobi engine in the UK?
items.answer: Yes, Fiat Mobi engines are available in the UK through specialist import networks and our marketplace of vetted suppliers who source Brazilian-spec units. While the Mobi was never sold officially in the UK, our network specialises in importing Fire Evo and Firefly engines with full warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Engines sourced from Brazil or European breakers with Mobi fitment
Typical lead time 7-14 days depending on engine code and variant
All supplied engines include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
Delivery arranged to your chosen UK garage or address
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Mobi engine import UK

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Fiat Mobi engine?
items.answer: Typical UK rebuilt Fiat Mobi engine prices range from £1,200-£3,200 supply-only, depending on whether you need Fire Evo or Firefly specification and current import logistics. Firefly engines often carry a small premium due to lower UK availability.
keyPoints: Fire Evo rebuilt: £1,200-£2,800 typical range
Firefly rebuilt: £1,400-£3,200 typical range
Supply & fit adds £450-£850 depending on garage location
Flex-fuel variants may carry additional sourcing costs
items.cta: Compare Fiat Mobi engine replacement costs UK

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Fiat Mobi?
items.answer: For UK-imported Mobis valued £4,000-£8,000, engine replacement is often worthwhile given the vehicle's low purchase price and running costs. However, obtain multiple quotes and factor in import logistics before committing.
keyPoints: Replacement cost typically 25-40% of a well-maintained Mobi's UK value
Rebuilt engine with warranty offers better long-term value than used unit
Consider total vehicle condition: suspension, bodywork, interior before deciding
Our network can provide valuation guidance alongside engine quotes
items.cta: Get specialist advice on Fiat Mobi repair vs replace

items.question: Will a Fiat Uno engine fit a Fiat Mobi?
items.answer: The Fiat Mobi and Uno share the 327 platform and many Fire Evo components, but engine swaps require careful verification of ECU, wiring loom and ancillary compatibility. Not all Uno engines are direct fits.
keyPoints: Fire Evo block architecture is shared but mounting points may differ
ECU calibration and sensor layouts often variant-specific
Ancillary components (alternator, AC compressor) may not interchange
Always confirm exact engine code compatibility before purchasing
items.cta: Check Fiat Mobi engine compatibility with our specialists

items.question: What is the difference between Fire Evo and Firefly engines?
items.answer: Fire Evo is a 4-cylinder 8-valve design with timing belt; Firefly is a 3-cylinder 6-valve design with timing chain. They share displacement but differ in layout, ECU, and failure patterns.
keyPoints: Fire Evo: 4-cyl, timing belt, 73-75hp, simpler design
Firefly: 3-cyl, timing chain, 75-77hp, better fuel economy
Different engine mounts and ancillary routing
Firefly engines command premium due to lower UK availability
items.cta: Compare Fire Evo vs Firefly replacement prices

items.question: Do Fiat Mobi engines use a cambelt or timing chain?
items.answer: Fire Evo engines use a timing belt requiring replacement every 60k miles; Firefly engines use a timing chain with tensioner that can wear from 50k miles. Both require proactive maintenance to avoid failure.
keyPoints: Fire Evo: belt replacement critical at 60k miles to prevent valve damage
Firefly: chain doesn't need routine replacement but tensioner can fail
Ignoring either leads to catastrophic engine damage requiring replacement
Our rebuilt engines include upgraded timing components as standard
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Mobi timing service or replacement engine

items.question: How long does a Fiat Mobi engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical turnaround is 7-14 days for engine sourcing plus 1-2 days for fitment at your chosen garage. Import logistics can extend lead times for Firefly or flex-fuel units.
keyPoints: Engine sourcing: 3-10 days depending on code and stock
Delivery to UK garage: 1-3 days domestic, longer for import units
Fitment and commissioning: 1-2 working days at specialist garage
Total timeline typically 7-14 days from quote acceptance
items.cta: Find Fiat Mobi engine supply & fit specialists near you

items.question: Do you supply Fiat Mobi engines with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes, every Fiat Mobi engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour at any UK garage, with optional extended coverage available.
keyPoints: Standard warranty: 12 months, unlimited mileage, UK-wide coverage
Covers manufacturing defects and premature component failure
Extended warranty options available at point of quote
Warranty valid regardless of which network supplier fulfils your order
items.cta: Compare Fiat Mobi engine warranty terms across suppliers

items.question: What oil should I use in a Fiat Mobi 1.0 Firefly engine?
items.answer: Fiat specifies 5W-30 fully synthetic oil meeting Fiat 9.55535-S1 for Firefly engines; Fire Evo units use 5W-40 semi-synthetic meeting Fiat 9.55535-G1. Always confirm spec for your exact engine code.
keyPoints: Firefly: 5W-30 fully synthetic, approx. 3.2L capacity with filter
Fire Evo: 5W-40 semi-synthetic, approx. 3.0L capacity with filter
Use oil meeting exact Fiat specification to maintain warranty
Oil change interval: 10k miles or 12 months whichever comes first
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Mobi engine service or replacement

items.question: Where can I find the engine code on my Fiat Mobi?
items.answer: The engine code stamp is located on the cylinder block near the oil filter housing; the vehicle VIN plate on the driver's door pillar also references the original engine specification for verification.
keyPoints: Block stamp: visible near oil filter, format like "312B2000" or "GSE4G10"
VIN plate: driver's door pillar, cross-reference with Fiat database
Registration lookup via our tool instantly identifies correct engine code
Always verify code before ordering replacement to ensure compatibility
items.cta: Identify your Fiat Mobi engine code instantly with our tool
